chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi, ACJ Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho, J C.P. No.D-5833 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.27228/2022 (Urgent). 2. For order on CMA No.27229/2022 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 7th December 2023 Mr. Inayat Ali Mirza, Advocate for Petitioner. -*-*-*-*-*- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. We have heard the learned counsel for petitioner and perused the record of this case. For the reasons to be recorded later on, instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed in limine alongwith listed application. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
